<USER_REQUEST>
Ive attached the original level manager script with the positions, make sure you only copy those and nothing else. obviously you need to adjust them so everything matches the current code. Idk what transfer you did, but at least the collsiion is woprking now. Proceed with the implementation plan, its looking good. Make sure you autorun everything and accept all changes, i dont want to click every time. I give you permission to do so. Plase let the user know if he needs to do something to make it work, also older people are using this app and they could get overwhelmed. Also please answer my other questions i have asked you in the prompt before. Plus give me more ideas how to make this the best experience and an ultimate campus viewer


var LevelManager = pc.createScript('levelManager');

LevelManager.attributes.add('mainSplatEntity', { type: 'entity', title: 'Main Splat Entity' });
LevelManager.attributes.add('envSplatEntity', { type: 'entity', title: 'Environment Splat (.sog)' });
